ingredients_text: 44% Fragrant Rice (Water, Basmati Rice, Ginger Purée: Lemon Juice, Rapeseed Oil, Salt, Cumin Seed, Turmeric, Curry Leaf), 36% Jalfrezi Sauce (Water, Tomato, Onion, Red Pepper, Green Pepper, Tomato Purée, Rapeseed Oil, Garlic Purée, Ginger Purée, Ground Coriander, Coriander Leaf, Chicken Flavour Stock [Vegetable Stock (Water, Onion, Carrot Juice, Tomato, Sage Extract), Glucose Syrup, Flavourings, Yeast Extracts, Salt, Maltodextrin, Sugar, Sunflower Oil, Rapeseed Oil], Paprika, Potato Starch, Cumin, Salt, Garam Masala [Coriander, Cumin, Ginger, Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Cloves, Cardamom, Bay Leaf], Colour: Paprika Extract; Green Chilli, Sugar, Chilli Powder, Cumin Seed, Kashmiri Chilli, Fennel Powder, Fenugreek), 20% Cooked Marinated British Chicken (84% Chicken Breast, Yogurt (Milk), Rapeseed Oil, Lemon Juice, Garlic Purée, Ginger Purée, Tandoori Masala [Ground Paprika, Chilli Powder, Ground Coriander, Ground Cumin, Garlic Granules, Ground Cassia, Ground Clove, Ground Fennel, Ground Bay Leaf, Salt, Colours: Beetroot Red, Paprika Extract; Acid: Citric Acid; Lemon Oil], Paprika Powder, Cornflour, Salt, Garam Masala [Coriander, Cumin, Ginger, Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Cloves, Cardamom and Bay Leaf], Green Chilli, Paprika Extract, Chilli Powder).
